name: Waldorf Red Velvet Cake and Frosting
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Flour, all purpose, sifted 2 to 3 times
recipeInstructions:
CAKE: Cream shortening and sugar until fluffy. Add eggs and beat 1 minute. Add salt, beat. Mix vanilla and red food coloring with buttermilk. Alternate adding flour and milk mixtures to the batter. Combine baking soda and vinegar in a cup and add to the cake batter. Bake for 25-30 minutes at 350°F in two 9-inch cake pans. Cool on racks.
FROSTING: Cook milk and flour until thick, then cool in the refrigerator. Beat butter, sugar, and vanilla with a mixer. Add flour and milk mixture gradually (beat well after making it ahead of time to allow cooling).
